  Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, single-page landing page, static content model, placeholder imagery, English-first, localization-ready.

  Manual scaffold completed in the current folder because `create-next-app` could not use the uppercase folder name `MVP` as an npm package name.

  Implemented the Marija Petrova travel landing page MVP with reusable components, central content data, responsive layout, SEO metadata, FAQ accordion, contact form UI, WhatsApp CTA, and placeholder assets.

  No extensions were required by the project setup information.
- [x] Compile the Project
  `npm install`, `npm run lint`, and `npm run build` all completed successfully.

  Created and started the `Next.js dev server` task.
